name: Hawaiian Nut Bread - Sugar Free
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
2. Add the chopped nuts to the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
3. In another bowl, beat the eggs, mashed bananas, vanilla extract, honey, and vegetable oil until well mixed.
4. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until just moistened.
5. Grease two 9"x5"x3" loaf pans with baking spray or butter.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
7. Bake at 325°F for 45 to 55 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the bread to cool in the pans for 10 minutes before removing and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
